case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS GOGOLIYN, YURI

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-08-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-08-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-08-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-12-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 NO OTHER CONTINUANCES TO BE GRANTED ABSENT AT SHOWING OF GOOD CAUSE.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT GOGOLIYN, YURI PLAINTIFF FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
